## BrowserNotReachableError class

Thrown when no CDP endpoint can be reached (Chrome not launched with debugging).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class BrowserNotReachableError extends AichatctlError 
```
**Extends:** [AichatctlError](./sdk.aichatctlerror.md)
